backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the full backend: user profiles, content metadata, likes, comments, follow relationships, playback queues, and a messaging system with conversations between principals, all gated by access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three messaging-related frontend features (message timestamps, reply button, and timestamp data model passthrough) to their implementation file ConversationView.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, card, primary, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'The Arena', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main.tsx entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Feed, Upload, ContentDetail, UserProfile, Mind, and Messages pages, and conditionally shows a ProfileSetupModal for newly authenticated users.
Comments section component that fetches, displays, and allows adding/deleting comments for a content item, with per-comment author profile lookup, relative timestamp formatting, and owner-only delete with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationDial: Reusable AlertDialog wrapper component for confirm/cancel prompts, supporting destructive or non-destructive styling, a pending/loading state with a spinner, and customizable title, description, and button labels.
frontend/src/components/ContentCard.tsx: Renders a media content card with thumbnail, file type badge, like/queue/delete actions, and navigation to content detail or uploader profile. Handles audio/video MIME type detection and owner-only delete with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/ConversationView: Displays a real-time messaging conversation between two users, with message bubbles, avatar display, reply context, and auto-scroll. Supports sending messages, marking them as read, and replying to specific messages.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileDialo: Modal dialog for editing a user's profile name, bio, and profile picture, with image preview, removal, and size validation. Submits changes via separate mutate hooks for profile data and profile picture.
Drag-and-drop and click-to-browse file input component that supports audio, video, image, or any file category with appropriate icons and hint text. Displays selected file name and size with a clear button.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header containing the logo, navigation links, login/profile controls, and a queue panel. Dynamically adds a Messages nav link with an unread badge when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx: A React media player component with play/pause, seek, volume, skip, repeat, and prev/next track controls. Renders a progress bar, control buttons, and volume slider with neon-styled UI.
frontend/src/components/ProfileMenu.tsx: A dropdown profile menu component that displays the user's avatar, name, and options to edit profile, delete account, or log out using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/QueuePanel.tsx: A slide-in side panel that displays the playback queue, allowing users to reorder, remove, or clear items and navigate to content by clicking queue entries.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailCreator: A component for creating media thumbnails either by capturing a frame from a video at a seekable position or by uploading an image file, with preview and clear functionality.
Displays a user's public profile card with avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and follow/unfollow/message actions, supporting both own and other users' profiles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, content, comments, likes, queue management, and messaging using the canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines the Arena dark-theme design tokens (CSS variables) for both light and dark modes along with utility classes for neon glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a single content item with its media player, like/queue controls, delete option for owners, and a collapsible comments section.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that lists all content with filtering by type (all/music/video), sorting by recency or popularity, and a search bar, rendered over a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Displays a two-panel messaging UI with a conversation list (showing partner avatars, names, last message, unread counts) and a ConversationView for the selected thread. Uses TanStack Router search params to track the active conversation.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupModal.tsx: A modal dialog for first-time profile setup, allowing users to enter a display name, optional bio, and optional profile picture before saving via the saveProfile mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: A form page for uploading audio or video content, handling file selection, thumbnail/album-cover capture, and progress tracking before submitting via the uploadContent mutation.
frontend/src/pages/UserProfilePage.tsx: Parses a Principal from the URL parameter and renders the UserProfileView component for that user, showing an error state if the principal is invalid.
frontend/src/pages/WhatsOnYourMindPage.t: A social feed page where authenticated users can create, like, and delete text/image posts, and view or add threaded comments on each post.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/videoFrameCapture.ts: Exports a single async function that captures the current frame of an HTMLVideoElement as a PNG Blob using an off-screen canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Arena project, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including arena-specific neon colors), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Enables dark mode via class and includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Arena messaging application project, including existing implemented features (message timestamps, reply button, data model) and pending new feature requests for timestamps and reply functionality.
